name: swiss-cheese
displayName: Swiss Cheese — Layered Defense for Agentic Coding
description: No single defense layer is perfect — stack enough imperfect ones that the holes never align. This plugin initializes Swiss Cheese defense layers in your repository, runs a token-frugal multi-agent code review from one shared diff, works autonomously in a loop applying the layers, guides you through building custom layers, audits docs/ADRs/review style, and discovers where task knowledge lives (Jira, Redmine, MCP servers).
